name: markdown-link-navigation-history
title: Markdown link navigation history and open in new tab

entries.note: Started execution from the accepted plan. Scope: per-tab file history, Back/Forward UI and shortcuts, local Markdown link Open in New Tab.
Added RED tests for file-history helpers and Markdown link target detection; the test fails as expected because tabHistory/markdownLinks helpers do not exist yet.
Implemented pure tab history and Markdown link helper modules; focused test now passes 8 cases.
Connected pure helpers into TabManager and MarkdownViewer; file-history navigation now uses a shared helper with canCloseTab guard before back/forward.
Added Back/Forward actions to TitleBar, Alt+Left/Alt+Right shortcuts, and Open in New Tab in the document context menu for resolvable local Markdown links.
Verification completed. Frontend unit helper tests, svelte-check, and production build pass; Rust cargo tests could not run because cargo is not installed in this environment.

verification.result: not run: cargo command not found

final_result: Implemented per-tab Markdown link file navigation history, Back/Forward UI and shortcuts, and Open in New Tab for local Markdown links.
